{"operationName":"Commons_Cms_CmsEmbed","variables":{"slug":"logged-in-homepage-mid","admin":false},"query":"query Commons_Cms_CmsEmbed($slug: String, $admin: Boolean) {
  pages: cmsPagesFetch(input: {slugs: [$slug], includeDrafts: $admin}) {
    _id
    id
    slug
    actionText
    actionUrl
    authorName
    description
    goLiveAt
    headerStyle
    layoutSlug
    pageType
    searchPlaceholder
    title
    metaTitle
    metaDescription
    noIndex
    image {
      imageUrl
      __typename
    }
    metaImage {
      imageUrl
      __typename
    }
    secondaryImage {
      imageUrl
      __typename
    }
    components {
      _id
      id
      position
      componentType
      data
      layoutSection
      experimentKey
      experimentBucket
      __typename
    }
    live
    pageNotFound
    __typename
  }
}"}
